Title: Runnable: MtrMon_Init
Description: Set OcSt=FALSE, OtSt=FALSE, MtrProtSt=OK, IqMaxOut=IqMaxNom, init state IRVs
Notes: Runnable ShortName=MtrMon_Init; RTE Event=InitEvent; Cycle / Condition=Once; Ports Read=IdMon, IqMon, MtrT, VdcMon; Ports Written=IqMaxOut, MtrProtSt, OcSt, OtSt; CalPrm Used=All MtrMon CalPrm; IRV Read=—; IRV Written=OcState, OtState; ExclusiveArea=—; Init Required=Yes; Return Type=void; Timing Budget=<50 µs

Title: Runnable: MtrMon_1ms
Description: 1. Read IdMon, IqMon → convert to float (×0.01)2. Compute |Idq|=sqrt(Id²+Iq²); compare to IOcThd3. OC detection with debounce counter (3 consecutive cycles)4. If OC: OcSt=TRUE, IqMaxOut=0, MtrProtSt=OC_Fault5. DC bus OV/UV check: VdcMon vs VdcOvThd and VdcUvThd6. Overspeed check: SpdMon vs OsSpdThd7. Update MtrProtSt with highest priority active fault
Notes: sqrt() may need CORDIC approximation for ASIL-B; Runnable ShortName=MtrMon_1ms; RTE Event=TimingEvent; Cycle / Condition=1 ms; Ports Read=IdMon, IqMon, VdcMon, SpdMon; Ports Written=OcSt, MtrProtSt, IqMaxOut; CalPrm Used=IOcThd, VdcOvThd, VdcUvThd, OsSpdThd; IRV Read=OcState; IRV Written=OcState; ExclusiveArea=EA_MtrState; Init Required=No; Return Type=void; Timing Budget=<60 µs

Title: Runnable: MtrMon_10ms
Description: 1. Read MtrT (sint16, °C)2. OT detection with hysteresis:   - Enter OT: T > TOtThd → OtSt=TRUE   - Exit OT:  T < (TOtThd - TOtHyst) → OtSt=FALSE3. Thermal derating: if T near threshold:   IqAvail = IqMaxNom - IqDerateSlope*(T - (TOtThd - 20))   Clamp IqAvail to [0, IqMaxNom]4. If OcState=Fault → IqMaxOut=0 (OC overrides derating)   Else: IqMaxOut = IqAvail5. Update MtrProtSt (OT_Fault or OT_Warn)
Notes: 10ms sufficient for thermal dynamics; Runnable ShortName=MtrMon_10ms; RTE Event=TimingEvent; Cycle / Condition=10 ms; Ports Read=MtrT; Ports Written=OtSt, IqMaxOut, MtrProtSt; CalPrm Used=TOtThd, TOtHyst, IqDerateSlope, IqMaxNom; IRV Read=OtState, OcState; IRV Written=OtState; ExclusiveArea=EA_MtrState; Init Required=No; Return Type=void; Timing Budget=<40 µs

Title: CalPrm: IOcThd
Notes: Must be < hardware OC threshold; CalPrm ShortName=IOcThd; Long Name=Overcurrent peak threshold; Impl. Type=float32; Unit=A; Default Value=150.0; Min Value=50.0; Max Value=400.0; Resolution=0.1; A2L Access=Yes; Online Calibratable=No; CompuMethod=ALnrl; Used In Runnable=MtrMon_1ms; Physical Description=Peak |Idq| threshold triggering overcurrent fault; Impact if Wrong=Too low: nuisance trips. Too high: motor / inverter damage

Title: CalPrm: TOtThd
Notes: Check motor datasheet; CalPrm ShortName=TOtThd; Long Name=Overtemperature trip threshold; Impl. Type=sint16; Unit=°C; Default Value=120; Min Value=80; Max Value=150; Resolution=1; A2L Access=Yes; Online Calibratable=No; CompuMethod=TIdentcl; Used In Runnable=MtrMon_10ms; Physical Description=Motor winding temperature triggering OT fault; Impact if Wrong=Too high: insulation damage / winding failure

Title: CalPrm: TOtHyst
Notes: CalPrm ShortName=TOtHyst; Long Name=Overtemperature hysteresis; Impl. Type=sint16; Unit=°C; Default Value=10; Min Value=2; Max Value=30; Resolution=1; A2L Access=Yes; Online Calibratable=No; CompuMethod=TIdentcl; Used In Runnable=MtrMon_10ms; Physical Description=Temperature must drop by this much below TOtThd to clear OT flag; Impact if Wrong=Too small: chattering. Too large: delayed recovery

Notes: CalPrm ShortName=VdcOvThd; Long Name=DC bus overvoltage threshold; Impl. Too high: capacitor damage

Title: CalPrm: VdcUvThd
Notes: CalPrm ShortName=VdcUvThd; Long Name=DC bus undervoltage threshold; Impl. Too low: controller brownout

Title: CalPrm: IqDerateSlope
Notes: CalPrm ShortName=IqDerateSlope; Long Name=Iq thermal derating slope; Impl. Type=float32; Unit=A/°C; Default Value=2.0; Min Value=0.1; Max Value=20.0; Resolution=0.01; A2L Access=Yes; Online Calibratable=Yes; CompuMethod=ALnrl; Used In Runnable=MtrMon_10ms; Physical Description=Rate at which IqMax is reduced per °C above derating start (TOtThd-20°C); Impact if Wrong=Too steep: aggressive derating.
